title: astragalus laxmannii var. adsurgens
intro: Astragalus laxmannii var. adsurgens, also known as the mountain milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory properties, which can help to enhance the body's ability to resist stress and disease. The health benefits of Astragalus laxmannii var. adsurgens include improved cardiovascular health, increased energy levels, and a strengthened immune system. Astragalus laxmannii var. adsurgens can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
